items.q: Which definition best matches 'equilibrium constant K'?
items.a: Ratio of product activities to reactant activities at equilibrium
options: Ratio of product activities to reactant activities at equilibrium
Minimum energy required for a reaction to proceed
Measure of disorder or number of microstates
Formal charge assigned to atoms for electron bookkeeping
items.explanation: equilibrium constant K means: Ratio of product activities to reactant activities at equilibrium.
